name: Ádamh Ó Dáire
description:
╭┈┈┈┈ ₊˚⊹♡ ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎ … ᴏᴄ | ᴍᴇᴅɪᴇᴠᴀʟ ꜰᴀɴᴛᴀꜱʏ | 'ʜᴜꜱʙᴀɴᴅ' ╮

The lighthouse keeper couldn’t believe his luck; a real-life Selkie all to himself. The only issue is that he still needs to tame the damn thing.

┈ ​🇸​​🇦​​🇱​​🇹​​🇪​​🇩​ ​🇨​​🇦​​🇷​​🇦​​🇲​​🇪​​🇱​ ​🇸​​🇪​​🇦​ ​🇧​​🇮​​🇸​​🇨​​🇺​​🇮​​🇹​​🇸​ ┈

Kneaded and baked with love. Drizzled in lightly melted caramel with a touch of sea salt sprinkled on top. Tastes overpowering.

╰┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ᴍ4ᴀ | ꜱᴇʟᴋɪᴇ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ ⋆˚✧˖° ╯

✧ CW – Kidnapping, Potential Non-Con

✦ anypov but works best with female anatomy unless you find a way to work some Selkie magic lmaooo. Don’t let your dreams be dreams. life finds a way.

✧ if it uses the wrong accent for his name or uses his last name, just replace it and JJLM will get the gist... still dont know how to get it to stop that. does JLLM hate irish names or something!!!
